name: Shukujo
text: Attach to a unique [clan-crane] character you control. Ancestral. Restricted. If attached character has the Champion trait, it gains "Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating – switch the conflict type."

name: Ornate Fan
text: Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.)

versions.flavor: At times, the ornamentation is the point. At others, it is merely a distraction.

“There is another kind of artist, who sets more soberly about his work, striving to give real beauty to the things which men actually use and to give to them the shape which tradition has ordained.” 
— Murasaki Shikibu

name: Pilgrimage
text: During conflicts at this province, cancel all ring effects. (If this province breaks, resolve ring effects as normal.)

versions.flavor:
“Faith is the greatest armor. The Seppun understand this as they guard the Empress — and as they brave the mountain's elemental trials.”
— Teachings of the Imperial Guard

name: Fine Katana
text: Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.)

versions.flavor:
Immortal steel waits
Venerated divine blade
The fires of the soul

“Just as a horse must have endurance and no defects, so it is with weapons. Horses should walk strongly, and swords and companion swords should cut strongly.”
— Miyamoto Musashi

name: Kakita Dōjō
text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel – resolve the duel. Until the end of the conflict, the duel's loser cannot trigger its abilities. If the duel's winner is a Duelist, bow the duel's loser as well.

name: Kakita Yuri
text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice - resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's loser cannot declare [conflict-military] conflicts this phase.

name: Doji Kuwanan
text: If you control Doji Hotaru, discard her. Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character with lower [conflict-military] skill than this character - bow that character.

versions.flavor: "I begin to suspect you don't even care about the truth."

name: Kakita Blade
text: Restricted. Attached character gets +2[conflict-political] while it is involved in a duel. Reaction: After attached character wins a duel – gain 1 honor.

name: Tengu Sensei
text: Covert. Reaction: After this character chooses a character using covert – that character cannot be declared as an attacker this phase.

name: Assassination
text: Conflict Action: Lose 3 honor. Choose a character with printed cost 2 or lower – discard that character. (Max 1 per round.)

versions.flavor: Steel whispered through silk and flesh. In the morning, they would find the body and speak of shadows and dishonor — but tonight, the deed was done.

name: Daidoji Uji
text: While this character is honored, you may play each card underneath it as if it were in your hand. Reaction: After this character enters play - search your conflict deck for 4 cards and place them underneath this character facedown (out of play). When this character leaves play, remove each facedown card underneath it from the game.

name: Kakita Kaezin
text: Action: While this character is participating in a conflict, your opponent must choose a participating character he or she controls – challenge that character to a [conflict-military] duel. If this character wins, move each character not involved in the duel home. If it loses, send it home.

versions.flavor:
"For the coward, there is no life.
For the hero, there is no death."

name: Kyūden Kakita
text: Reaction: After a duel resolves, bow this stronghold and choose a character you control that was involved in the duel - honor that character.

name: Seeker of Air
text: You may replace 1 province of any element with an additional [element-air] province while deckbuilding. Reaction: After an [element-air] province you control is revealed – gain 1 fate.

name: Cautious Scout
text: While this character is attacking alone, treat the defending province as if its printed text box were blank (except for Traits).

versions.flavor: They told him to be careful, but there was only one way to know for sure.

name: Elemental Fury
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – switch the contested ring with an unclaimed ring. (The conflict retains its type.)

name: Fertile Fields
text: Conflict Action: Draw 1 card.

versions.flavor: "Inari-no-Kami smiles upon these lands." - Aiko, priestess of Inari
“The fortunes blessed these lands, but it takes honest work to harvest them.”

name: Game of Sadane
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character you control and a participating character your opponent controls – your character challenges the opponent's character to a [conflict-political] duel. Honor the duel's winner and dishonor the duel's loser.

name: Make Your Case
text: Seeker role only. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel against a character your opponent controls of their choice - resolve the duel. Place 1 fate on the duel's winner.

name: Proving Ground
text: Reaction: After a character you control wins a duel - draw 1 card. (Limit twice per round.)

name: Storied Defeat
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a character that has lost a duel during this conflict - bow that character. You may spend 1 fate to dishonor that character.

versions.flavor: An honorable lineage, undone by a single stroke.

name: Ancestral Lands
text: This province gets +5 strength during [conflict-political] conflicts.

versions.flavor: "Our claim on these lands stretches back to the dawn of the Empire."
“We cannot know if the sun has set forever on the Emerald Empire, but its remembered glory will shine through our long nights of exile.”

name: Arrogant Kakita
text: Pride. Forced Reaction: After defenders are declared during a conflict in which this character is participating, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel. If this character is the duel's loser, move it home. (Unlimited.)

name: Daidoji Harrier
text: Reaction: After this character wins a [conflict-military] conflict, your opponent chooses 2 cards in his or her hand - reveal those cards. You choose and discard one of them.

versions.flavor: "Vitory will only be achieved through preparedness." - Daidoji Uji

name: Daimyō's Gunbai
text: Restricted. Action: During a conflict, if this card is in your hand, reveal it and initiate a [conflict-military] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice - resolve the duel. Put this card into play attached to the duel's winner, if able. Otherwise, discard it.

name: Doji Challenger
text: Action: While this character is attacking, choose a character controlled by your opponent – move that character to this conflict.

versions.flavor: "I hope you are prepared to defend your words with steel!"

name: Iaijutsu Master
text: Attach to a Duelist character. Reaction: After honor dials are revealed during a duel in which attached character is participating - increase or decrease the value of your bid by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

name: Kakita Favorite
text: This character gets +2[conflict-political] while it is involved in a duel.

versions.flavor: "They will forget your name when they hear of mine."

name: Daidoji Nerishma
text: Action: Choose a facedown card in one of your provinces – turn that card faceup.

versions.flavor: "It's an ambush! Be ready!"

name: Duelist Training
text: Attached character gains: "Action: While this character is participating in a conflict, choose a participating character controlled by your opponent – challenge that character to a [conflict-military] duel. Instead of giving honor for this duel's bid, a player may choose and discard the required number of cards from hand. Bow the loser of the duel."

name: Insult to Injury
text: Reaction: After a Duelist character you control wins a duel – dishonor the losing character.

versions.flavor: "Surely, your blade must have been caught in its sheath for your draw to have been so slow."

name: Kakita Toshimoko
text: Interrupt: When this character would lose a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice - resolve the duel. If this character wins, instead of resolving the conflict as normal, both players count 0 total skill in the conflict. (Return the contested ring to the unclaimed ring pool. The conflict has no winner.)

name: Way of the Crane
text: Action: Choose a [clan-crane] character you control – honor that character.

versions.flavor: There is a proper technique for all things.

name: Duel to the Death
text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel – your opponent may dishonor his or her character to refuse the duel. Otherwise, resolve the duel. Discard the duel's loser.

versions.flavor: "So be it." - Kakita Toshimoko

name: Graceful Guardian
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating - during each player's next action opportunity in this conflict, increase the cost to play cards by 1.

versions.flavor: "Victory without honor is no victory at all."

name: Iron Crane Legion
text: No attachments except Weapon. During conflicts in which you are the attacking or defending player, X is equal to the number of cards in your opponent's hand. (Otherwise, X is zero.)

name: Issue a Challenge
text: Reaction: After a Bushi character you control attacks alone - your opponent cannot declare more than 1 character as a defender in this conflict.

versions.flavor: "If your skill with a blade is even half of what you have boasted, you will face me alone like a true samurai."

name: Seal of the Crane
text: Attached character gains the [clan-crane] clan symbol and the Duelist trait.

versions.flavor:
In the name of Her Elegance, Lady Doji Hotaru,
Trusted Left Hand of the Emperor,
Beautiful Mistriss of the Arts,
Skillfull Daimyō of the Doji, and
Indomitable Champion of the Crane Clan

name: Courtly Challenger
text: After this character wins a duel, honor it. After this character loses a duel, dishonor it. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel - resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's winner draws 2 cards.

name: Cunning Negotiator
text: Rally. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel against a character your opponent controls of their choice - resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's winner may trigger the attacked province's action ability as if they controlled the province, even if it has already been triggered this round (or specified period).

name: Aspiring Challenger
text: Composure - This character gets +2 glory. (You have composure if your honor bid is lower than an opponent's.) Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel. Honor the duel's winner.

name: Arbiter of Authority
text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel – your opponent may dishonor his or her character to refuse the duel. Otherwise, resolve the duel. Bow and move home the duel's loser.

versions.flavor: Yuuhisa immediately regretted asking who had requested the historical records.

name: Daidoji Iron Warrior
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - each player discards cards from their hand until they have 4 or fewer cards in hand.

versions.flavor: "We may be outnumbered, but we will never be outmatched."

name: Disparaging Challenge
text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel against a character your opponent controls in their home area - resolve the duel. Move the duel's loser to the conflict, if able. Otherwise, move it home.

name: Kakita's Final Stance
text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a participating character - until the end of the conflict, that character cannot be bowed by opponent's card effects. If it is involved in a duel during this conflict, it does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.

name: Meditations on the Tao
text: Conflict Action: Choose an attacking character – remove 1 fate from that character.

versions.flavor: "Appreciation of beauty is the beginning of wisdom." - Tao of Shinsei

"The motion of the Tao is the return
The way of the Tao is yielding
All things under the Sky come from existence
All that exists comes out of Nothing"
— Laozi

name: Local Daimyō's Retainer
text: You can only play this card if you control at least 3 faceup provinces.

versions.flavor: "My lord, is it wise to bring such lowly rōnin into your service? Surely there is a Doji or Kakita pupil who would serve better than... her."
